items.prompt: identifies variable roles and interprets bounded relationships across tables, graphs, and verbal contexts
items.expected_evidence: identify which quantity is treated as the input-like or driving quantity in a bounded relationship
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies the variable roles and relationship correctly.

items.prompt: explains how changing one quantity affects another and why one quantity is treated as dependent on the other
items.expected_evidence: identify which quantity changes in response and how it is recorded
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the relationship between the two quantities coherently.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to representation_role_disconnect.
items.expected_evidence: connect verbal relationship statements to tables, points, and simple symbolic rules
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer lost the relationship between variable roles across representations.

items.prompt: succeeds across symbolic, table, verbal, graph, and simple contextual variable-relationship representations
items.expected_evidence: explain paired values as related measures of one relationship rather than as separate facts
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves variable-relationship meaning across varied representations and contexts.
